title: 4K Spell Chaos
sourceTitle: 4k Prompt Spell Midjourney V7 Sref Chaos
prompt:
Quality: Photography. Live-action film. Cyberpunk.
Light source: Spotlight.
View angle: Composition with depth. Dynamic angle.
Theme: A beautiful young Japanese woman dancing while wearing a cyberpunk fox mask.
Pose: Holding a glowing pink energy sword and facing the camera.
Equipment: Two Japanese swords carried on her back.
Clothing: Long white and gold kimono, long skirt, and white tights.
Location: An ancient Japanese stage with a gold folding screen, tatami mats, and wood, with multiple red lanterns and red torii gates.
Hair: White hair, styled with bangs, pink inner color, short hair.
Eyes: Gold and blue gradient with white highlights.
--raw
--no text, blackface, tan, dark skin, facial piercings, sunglasses, blood, tatto
--chaos 2.5
--stylize 450
--sref 1306795333::5 4086852592::10 1190150439::10
--ar 3:4
